resultList.dtldesc: 2 BHK Multistorey Apartment for Sale in Isnapur, HyderabadA well-furnished 2 BHK apartment is available for sale in the peaceful and well-connected locality of Isnapur, Hyderabad. This property is situated on the 3rd floor of a low-rise building and offers a blend of comfort, security, and modern amenities, making it an ideal home for small families seeking a ready-to-move-in apartment. The apartment is designed to offer ample natural light and ventilation, ensuring a pleasant living experience throughout the year.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features 2 bedrooms, with the master bedroom furnished with wardrobes and a dressing wardrobe with full-length mirror, while the childrens bedroom includes wardrobes. The flooring throughout the apartment is vitrified tiles, providing durability and a clean, polished look. The living room is spacious, though unfurnished, and both bedrooms are connected to their respective balconies. There are 2 balconies one attached to the childrens bedroom overlooking the society park, and the other attached to the kitchen, opening to the wash area and open spaces outside. The kitchen is semi-modular, equipped with cabinets, a granite platform, and a stainless steel sink, though no piped gas connection is available.BathroomsThe apartment has 2 bathrooms, with the master bedroom bathroom designed in western style and the common bathroom in Indian style. A geyser is installed in the common bathroom, and all electrical fittings, including lights and fans, are provided throughout the apartment.FacilitiesThe society offers a wide range of amenities including a society park, clubhouse, gym, childrens play area, and badminton court, ensuring recreational options for residents. 24-hour power backup for common areas and 20-hour security are available. The apartment comes with 1 covered car parking, along with additional common parking spaces. Security features include CCTV surveillance throughout the society.LocalityThe property is located near reputed schools such as St. Marry Grammar High School, Triveni School, and Maples School, and hospitals including Dhurva Women
